name: open-regression-copilot
description: Open-source AI regression and API testing platform for QA teams.

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace @orc/api & npm run dev --workspace @orc/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @orc/api && npm run build --workspace @orc/web
scripts.check: npm run check --workspace @orc/api && npm run check --workspace @orc/web
